description: You are an immunologist setting up ELISA assay documentation in SciNote ELN. Within the project 'ELISA Assay Development - IL-6', create an 'Antibody Pair Optimization' experiment with a sequential workflow of four connected tasks: 'Plate Coating', 'Sample Dilution', 'Primary Antibody Incubation', and 'Signal Detection'. The 'Plate Coating' task must include a protocol of at least 5 steps. Update the 'ELISA Consumables' inventory by adding 'Volume (mL)' and 'Storage Temperature' columns and recording three items: 'IL-6 Capture Antibody' (Supplier: R&D Systems, Catalog: MAB206), 'IL-6 Detection Antibody' (Supplier: R&D Systems, Catalog: BAF206), and 'Streptavidin
